catalog_aliases.caption: Figure 24.6 Average deviance, estimated effective number of parameters, and deviance information criterion (DIC) for each of four models fit to the dog data in Section 24.2.
catalog_aliases.evidence: The parsed table footnote is the formal caption: 'Figure 24.6 Average deviance, estimated efective number of parameters, and deviance information criterion (DIC) for each of four models fit to the dog data in Section 24.2.'

overrides.reason: Figure 24.6 is rendered as a table block with its formal Figure caption in footnote; expose it as a figure catalog alias instead of inventing a separate image. The source object is a text/table display, so kind=text prevents image-file validation for the figure alias.
